title: New version to my automation V1.2
author: No_Page5992
selftext:
Hey all!

This is my next version of my automated trading bot.  
I've encountered some complications on the last version.  
The main issue was that the bot was not taking enough trades, while it should've.  
Me and my partner found out this was mainly caused due to an error in the analysis component of the bot.  
This has all been reworked in this version.

Also in this version, our TP mechanics have been compeltely re-worked. The bot now take partials the way it should and in the way my strategy describes.

In this test-run i've tested EURUSD in the time period from 1st of Jan to this day. In this period the bot managed to gather a profit of 67%.

My bot is a multi-timeframe bot which means it uses 3 different timeframes, the bias, confirmation and execution timeframe.  
I use the daily, hourly and 1 minute for this.

It uses structure points for TP's, whenever price broke through the structural high/low on the execution timeframe, it will take a partial there, and move SL to BE, since we expect price to move higher to break the structural high of the confirmation timeframe, which will be the last TP.

I will not share this bot in any way, the only thing i will be doing whenever this bot is finished, is start a copy-trade program for people to profit with me.  
I have a server in which i show many more test-results, and all explanations needed to understand this bot yourself, there will be no costs for this.

What do you guys think? All feedback is welcome.
